race.comment: UNMATCHED (12) was superb from the back of the pack last start at Newcastle, with the winner there since winning again at Goulburn last week. He's now with the Kelley stable locally and he looks well placed on his most recent effort. Settles closer and he can fire a shot. TURN LEFT (4) was just fair two back but turned in a much better effort last start in this grade, beaten just 0.8L in an in-form galloper. Boudvillain remains in the irons and this looks to shape similarly. Can go one better this time around. WEBEJAMIN (6) has been racing in stronger company than this for a while now and lobs here third-up and back on top of the ground. He jumps straight out in trip, but he's better suited here and he looks poised to strike. BO COUGAR (3) can improve sharply and it wouldn't surprise to see him feature.
